assertions.expectation: Distinguishes between dev (Rapid) and prod (Stable) clusters in the checklists
assertions.reason: The response clearly distinguishes between dev clusters on Rapid channel and prod clusters on Stable channel, recommending testing on dev first before prod upgrades

assertions.expectation: Recognizes Autopilot limitations (no node management, no SSH, mandatory resource requests)
assertions.reason: Includes Autopilot-specific considerations section mentioning resource requests within limits and restricted workloads, though doesn't explicitly mention no SSH or node management limitations

assertions.expectation: Includes API deprecation checks with kubectl commands
assertions.reason: Provides specific kubectl command for auditing workloads for deprecated API usage in the pre-upgrade checklist

assertions.expectation: Mentions mandatory resource requests as an Autopilot-specific concern
assertions.reason: Explicitly mentions 'Verify resource requests are within Autopilot limits' in the Autopilot-specific considerations section

assertions.expectation: Pre-upgrade checklist includes workload readiness items (PDBs, bare pods, graceful shutdown)
assertions.reason: Includes Pod Disruption Budgets, health checks (readiness/liveness probes), and resource configurations in the Application Readiness section

assertions.expectation: Post-upgrade checklist includes version verification commands
assertions.reason: Provides specific gcloud and kubectl commands to verify cluster status and node health in the post-upgrade immediate verification section

assertions.expectation: Post-upgrade checklist includes workload health validation
assertions.reason: Includes comprehensive application health checks, pod status verification, and functionality testing sections in the post-upgrade checklist

assertions.expectation: Recommends testing on dev clusters before prod auto-upgrade
assertions.reason: Explicitly recommends testing on Rapid channel dev clusters first and includes timeline recommendations with staged approach

assertions.expectation: Mentions that checking the GKE release schedule gives ~1 month best-case advance notice for new minor upgrades, beyond the 72h notification
assertions.reason: Does not mention the GKE release schedule or the ~1 month advance notice timeline - only addresses the immediate upgrade situation
Includes comprehensive monitoring sections covering metrics collection, log ingestion, alerting rules, and custom monitoring tools

assertions.expectation: Does NOT proactively recommend node-level maintenance exclusions for Autopilot unless the customer explicitly asks for node upgrade control
assertions.reason: Correctly does not mention node-level maintenance exclusions, focusing appropriately on Autopilot-managed aspects
